problem_statement: Given an array nums consisting of only 0, 1, or 2. Sort the array in non-decreasing order. The sorting must be done in-place, without making a copy of the original array.

examples.explanation: The nums array in sorted order has 2 zeroes, 2 ones and 1 two
The nums array in sorted order has 2 zeroes, 3 ones and zero twos.
